summary: Architecture review complete. ARCHITECTURE.md (627 lines) is comprehensive and accurate — mermaid diagram, full directory tree, verified function signatures, data flow, Vision mapping table, and 5 known limitations all documented. Remaining partial gaps (middleware minimal, MediaPipe browser-only, optimizer.js split, adapters/embed.js stub, mDNS not implemented) are all explicitly documented as known limitations or architectural decisions. Updated codebase-map.md with current test status (171/173 files pass, 970/983 tests pass). No architecture changes needed — document is stable.
